title: Centipede Control Upper West Side | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional centipede control in Upper West Side, Manhattan. Fast, effective extermination for pre-war buildings & brownstones. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service.
intro: Centipedes thrive in the damp basements, aging pipe chases, and pre-war architecture common throughout the Upper West Side. Our specialized centipede control services protect Manhattan homes and apartments from these fast-moving pests that often enter through cracks in older buildings. Best Pest Control NYC provides targeted treatments for $350-$550 to eliminate centipedes and prevent future infestations in your Upper West Side property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has over 15 years of experience serving Upper West Side residents, with deep knowledge of the unique pest challenges in classic Manhattan buildings from Riverside Drive to Central Park West. Our licensed technicians use safe, effective treatments designed specifically for the historic brownstones, luxury high-rises, and walk-ups that define this iconic neighborhood.
localContext: The Upper West Side's beautiful pre-war buildings, tree-lined streets near Riverside Park, and proximity to the Hudson River create ideal conditions for centipede activity, especially in garden-level apartments and basement spaces. From Lincoln Center to Columbia University, our team serves the entire neighborhood with discrete, efficient service that respects the character of this historic Manhattan community.

faqs.question: Why are centipedes so common in Upper West Side apartments?
faqs.answer: Upper West Side buildings, many dating from the early 1900s, often have older plumbing systems, damp basements, and foundation cracks that provide perfect entry points and habitat for centipedes. The neighborhood's proximity to Riverside Park and abundant street trees also contribute to moisture levels that attract these pests.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a centipede problem in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout the Upper West Side, from the 59th Street border up to 110th Street. Our technicians are familiar with navigating Manhattan traffic and building access protocols to reach you quickly and efficiently.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 centipede control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection of your Upper West Side property, targeted treatment of centipede hiding spots, perimeter protection, moisture control recommendations, and sealing of common entry points. The price varies based on property size and infestation severity, with follow-up visits included as needed.

faqs.question: Are your centipede treatments safe for pre-war buildings and families?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products specifically selected for safety in residential buildings, including those with children, pets, and elderly residents. Our methods are designed to be effective against centipedes while preserving the integrity of historic Upper West Side architecture and ensuring the health of your family.
